executive_summary.title: Executive Business Summary
executive_summary.summary: The e-commerce platform shows business performance across revenue, orders, customers, sellers, and recent monthly trends.
key_findings: The platform processed 98,666 orders with total revenue value of 15,843,553.24.
The business includes 96,096 unique customers and 3,095 sellers.
The latest meaningful sales period is 2018-08, with revenue of 1,003,308.47 from 6,452 orders.
recommended_actions: Monitor monthly revenue and order trends to identify demand changes early.
Use customer geography and product category performance to find priority growth areas.
Review sales KPIs together with operational alerts before making business decisions.

sales_performance.title: Sales Performance Summary
sales_performance.summary: The sales performance layer highlights product category performance and customer geography patterns.
key_findings: The highest revenue product category is health_beauty with revenue of 1,441,248.07.
The highest revenue customer state is SP with revenue of 5,921,678.12.
recommended_actions: Prioritise high-performing product categories in dashboard storytelling.
Use customer state performance to identify strong regional demand.
Compare product revenue with review scores to avoid focusing only on sales volume.

operational_risk.title: Operational Risk Summary
operational_risk.summary: The operational layer highlights anomaly alerts, seller risk, category risk, and business areas requiring attention.
key_findings: The anomaly detection layer generated 696 operational alerts.
There are 576 high severity alerts and 120 medium severity alerts.
The most common alert type is SELLER_PERFORMANCE_RISK with 424 alerts.
A high-risk seller example is 20f0aeea30bc3b8c4420be8ced4226c0 with late delivery rate 100.00% and average review score nan.
A high-risk category example is security_and_services with risk level high.
recommended_actions: Prioritise high severity operational alerts before medium severity alerts.
Review sellers with high late delivery rates and low review scores.
Investigate product categories with weak review performance or delivery risk.
Use alert type trends to decide whether issues are related to delivery, seller performance, revenue, freight, or customer satisfaction.

recommendations.title: AI-Ready Business Recommendations
recommendations.summary: The project is ready to support AI-assisted business decision-making because the insights are generated from trusted dbt models, KPI views, and operational risk views.
key_findings: The platform processed 98,666 orders with total revenue value of 15,843,553.24.
The business includes 96,096 unique customers and 3,095 sellers.
The highest revenue product category is health_beauty with revenue of 1,441,248.07.
The anomaly detection layer generated 696 operational alerts.
There are 576 high severity alerts and 120 medium severity alerts.
recommended_actions: Use the executive dashboard to monitor revenue, order volume, customers, sellers, and review performance.
Use operational anomaly alerts as an early warning layer for delivery, seller, freight, review, and revenue issues.
Create a weekly review process focused on high-risk sellers and high-risk product categories.
Expose the insights layer through FastAPI so dashboards, apps, and future AI tools can reuse the same trusted outputs.
In the Azure version, store API keys in Azure Key Vault and orchestrate the pipeline with Azure Data Factory.
